notes: Runtime execution, process control, logging, and auditing.
The landing/staging area, a transient temporary storage area to store data for downstream processing. Part of the Staging Layer.
The systems that provide the data.
Persistent Staging Area (PSA), immutable historized data recorded as transactions. Part of the Staging Layer.
'Source' layer, representing the operational systems or interfaces that provide data to the solution.
Staging Layer, the ingestion layer of the data solution.
